mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.fact_reviews_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, product_id, product_name, product_sku, customer_id, customer_name, customer_email, order_id, rating, title, body, verified_purchase, helpful_count, report_count, moderator_notes, state_id, flow_id, created_at ) SELECT r.id, r.tenant, NOW(), r.product_id, COALESCE(p.name, ''), COALESCE(p.sku, ''), r.customer_id, COALESCE(u.first_name || ' ' || COALESCE(u.last_name, ''), ''), COALESCE(u.email, ''), r.order_id, r.rating, r.title, r.body, r.verified_purchase, COALESCE(r.helpful_count, 0), COALESCE(r.report_count, 0), r.moderator_notes, r.state_id, r.flow_id, r.created_time FROM hm_review.product_reviews r LEFT JOIN hm_product.products p ON r.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN hm_user.user_profiles u ON r.customer_id = u.id
